status_legend.in_progress: The feature is the current active task.
status_legend.blocked: Work cannot continue until a documented blocker is resolved.
status_legend.passing: Required verification has passed and evidence is recorded.

features.title: Configure C9300 VLANs, trunks, and SVI
features.user_visible_behavior: C9300 has all 7 VLANs, correct trunk configs, and can ping FortiGate 10.10.10.2
verification: show interfaces trunk shows correct allowed VLANs
show ip interface brief shows Vlan10 up/up
evidence: 2026-05-29 live C9300 FortiGate trunk TwentyFiveGigE2/1/2 updated additively from 10,11,100 to 10,11,30,40,50,60,100; VLAN10 ping to FortiGate remained OK
features.notes: Running-config validated but NOT saved with write memory. FortiGate trunk now carries 10,11,30,40,50,60,100 for routed VLAN gateway work.

features.title: Confirm FortiGate parent interface & create VLAN interfaces
features.user_visible_behavior: FortiGate tracks live VLAN 10 as hlvl, keeps VLAN 99 on mgt, and adds only routed VLAN gateways 30,40,50,60 after trunk review
verification: FortiGate VLAN plan template renders successfully
show system interface shows hlvl, mgt, and routed VLAN interfaces 30,40,50,60
evidence: Added fortinet.fortios collection requirements, FortiGate inventory, group_vars intent, discovery playbook, render-plan playbook, and gated apply playbook
Static YAML validation passed for 5 Ansible YAML files

2026-05-28 read-only verification: API reachable at https://10.99.99.2:7443; 41 interfaces seen; x2 is VLAN parent; hlvl VLAN10 exists with 10.10.10.2/24; VLANs 20,30,40,50,60 are missing; VLAN99 target conflicts with mgt hard-switch 10.99.99.2/24
2026-05-29 adopted live FortiGate names: hlvl tracks VLAN10, mgt tracks VLAN99, VLAN20 excluded from FortiGate routing, and only VLANs 30,40,50,60 remain as FortiGate candidates
2026-05-29 read-only verification after intent update: hlvl and mgt matched; VLANs 30,40,50,60 are the only missing FortiGate targets
2026-05-29 FortiGate apply created vsvc VLAN30, vapps VLAN40, vlab VLAN50, and vdmz VLAN60 on parent x2; post-apply API verification showed 6/6 target matches
features.notes: Live FortiGate VLAN interfaces 30,40,50,60 are now present with short FortiOS-safe names. Parent interface verified as x2. C9300-to-FortiGate trunk now carries 10,11,30,40,50,60,100 in running-config. Local Windows Ansible CLI fails during startup with WinError 87; run Ansible from WSL/Linux or use configs/fortigate-api-apply-vlans.py from this workstation. Apply is gated by CONFIRM_FORTIGATE_APPLY=yes and CONFIRM_FORTIGATE_TRUNK_REVIEW=yes.

features.title: Proxmox SDN discovery and configuration
features.user_visible_behavior: Proxmox SDN zone ztrunk and VNets exist on nodes A,B,D; nodeF pending
verification: ip -br link shows VNet interfaces on all nodes
vmbr0 is VLAN-aware on all nodes
evidence: API discovery: 4 nodes (nodeA,nodeB,nodeD,nodeF), OVS vmbr0 confirmed
SDN zone ztrunk created on vmbr0
6 VNets: vmgmt(10), vstore(20), vsvc(30), vapps(40), vlab(50), vdmz(60)
OVS trunks synced from live: nodeA=en10basep2, nodeB=ennic1s1, nodeD=eno1, nodeF=sfp1
nodeA/B/D trunk: 3,10,11,30,40,50,60 | nodeF trunk: 10,11,30,40,50,60 (VLAN 3 via dedicated vmbr3)
2026-05-29 Proxmox/FortiGate gateway validation: SDN gateway checks OK for vsvc/vapps/vlab/vdmz and OVS trunk checks OK for nodeA/nodeB/nodeD/nodeF
features.notes: Repo synced from live Proxmox 2026-05-28. All 4 nodes have OVS trunk ports with SDN zone + 6 VNets active cluster-wide. Repo intent now treats vstore/VLAN20 as storage-side only with no FortiGate gateway. 2026-05-29 validation found zero VMs/CTs directly attached to routed VNets vsvc/vapps/vlab/vdmz, so guest-side gateway ping still requires an attached test workload.

features.title: Visualize current homelab network configuration
features.user_visible_behavior: Current repo and live-synced network state is represented as a Mermaid network diagram with VLAN, VNet, trunk, and known-risk notes
evidence: Created docs/current-network-diagram.md from data/network-plan.json, Cisco/FortiGate config snapshots, Proxmox SDN script, and session-handoff.md
Baseline ./init.sh passed after fixing init.sh Python selection and data/network-plan.json JSON syntax
features.notes: Diagram intentionally calls out the FortiGate trunk/VLAN gateway review item and the Cisco Proxmox trunk discrepancy between validated config snapshots and network-plan target.
